summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Medikal Africa React.js application. All core functionality working correctly with ultra-minimalist 3-color design.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero, video section, stats, features, partners (NVIDIA, Africa CDC, AMR, RoboLabs), CTA
Mobile responsiveness - hamburger menu opens/closes correctly
Platform page shows architecture diagram and core systems
AMR page displays crisis stats and detection flow
Research page shows mission stats and strategic partners
Request Demo form renders and accepts input with proper validation
Partner logos display correctly including NVIDIA logo
Ultra-minimalist design with 3 colors (#5EC4D5, #979797, black) implemented correctly
All interactive elements clickable and properly functional
